focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack assigns Evan's sex scandal story for sweeps, sidelining Bruce's piece; Bruce reacts bitterly to the decision while Evan mocks him, prompting Jack to refocus the meeting.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Field reporter whose story is sidelined for sweeps in favor of Evan's piece.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: During the morning meeting, Jack assigns Evan's sex scandal story for sweeps, holding Bruce's story in reserve, and Evan mocks Bruce with a cookie metaphor.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce slides down into his chair, deflated, after his story is held in reserve.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bruce's frustration with the sidelining of his story and rivalry with Evan, as shown by his retort and deflated posture.
evidence_quotes: JACK Nice story, Bruce, but we're going with Evan's piece on the sex scandal at the mayor's office for sweeps.
JACK Okay, knock it off... Bruce we're holding your story in reserve. Now, can we get back to the board so we have something to air today?
Bruce slides down into his chair, deflated.

relation_updates: Jack dismisses Bruce's story in favor of Evan's
Evan mocks Bruce with a cookie metaphor, reinforcing rivalry
status_updates: Bruce's story is held in reserve
Bruce feels deflated and slides down in his chair
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Frustrated reporter reacting to professional slight.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 15、EXT. NIAGARA FALLS - MAID OF THE MIST BOAT - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bruce is stunned as Evan Baxter replaces Pete Fineman on air; Susan announces Evan's promotion before cutting to Bruce's live report at Niagara Falls.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bruce is preparing for a live report at Niagara Falls when he hears Evan Baxter's promotion announcement on the feed.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bruce reacts with visible shock upon hearing Evan Baxter announced as the new anchor.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce is in shock and about to go on air for his live report.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How Bruce will perform on air in his stunned state.
evidence_quotes: His FACE GOES WHITE. He stands in shock.
Bruce listens on the feed, beyond stunned.

status_updates: Bruce is shocked and in disbelief
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Reporter shocked by unexpected career news.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bruce is thrown out of the building, his belongings spilling as he flails at the structure.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bruce is physically expelled from the office building.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bruce is tossed out the front doors, his box of possessions spilling on the ground, and he flails at the building.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Outside the building with spilled belongings.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The physical ejection and spilled possessions.
evidence_quotes: Bruce is TOSSED OUT THE FRONT DOORS
his box of possessions spilling on the ground
Bruce FLAILS at the building.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Reporter ejected from his workplace.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: God, as the janitor, offers Bruce his divine powers to prove he can do better, then vanishes; Bruce, terrified, flees after witnessing impossible events and the sudden disappearance of God.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bruce meets a janitor who performs supernatural acts and claims to know everything about him.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: The janitor demonstrates supernatural knowledge and control over objects, suggesting a divine identity.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce is skeptical and physically affected by the supernatural events, as shown when he is dragged by the file cabinet.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bruce's disbelief and the janitor's true identity.
evidence_quotes: JANITOR You must be Bruce. I've been expecting you.
JANITOR Oh, I know a lot about you Bruce. Pretty much everything there is to know.
Bruce pulls the drawer and it FLIES OPEN, DRAGGING HIM THE FULL LENGTH OF THE ROOM
The Janitor unzips his uniform, revealing a very nice suit.

relation_updates: Bruce establishes contact with God
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bruce's sarcastic and disbelieving attitude in response to unexplained events.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: God and Bruce walk on a lake, watch a sailboat pass, and God takes back the prayer beads, saying he's going on vacation and leaves Bruce to return to shore alone.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bruce is given divine powers and rules by God on the lake.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: God explains the two rules of secrecy and free will, takes back the prayer beads, announces he is going on vacation, and leaves Bruce alone on the lake.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To use the powers while adhering to the rules of not telling anyone he is God and not messing with free will.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce is alone on the lake and begins to return to shore, first tiptoeing and then sprinting.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Managing the divine powers in God's absence during his vacation.
evidence_quotes: You can't tell anyone you're God. Believe me you don't want that kind of attention. And you can't mess with free will.
God dips his hand in the Lake and pulls out THE PRAYER BEADS. He pockets them as he talks.
I'm taking a vacation.
Left alone, Bruce begins to carefully tip toe back to shore, progresses to a full sprint.

relation_updates: God transfers power and sets rules
God departs on vacation
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bruce, now holding divine powers but bound by two specific rules, left to act alone.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bruce multiplies into many duplicates, overwhelming a gang with chaotic teamwork; the gang flees. He then releases a swarm of locusts from his mouth as the duplicates reabsorb into him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bruce uses duplication and locust powers to defeat a gang.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bruce duplicates himself to overwhelm the gang, causing them to flee, and then releases locusts.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To force the gang to apologize and teach them a lesson.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: The gang flees, and Bruce reabsorbs his duplicates before releasing locusts.
evidence_quotes: BRUCE Look, I don't want to fight you guys. So as soon as you apologize, I'll be on my way.
BRUCE Now I'm going to have to teach the rest of you guys a lesson.
BRUCE I'll take it from here. Bruce takes a deep breath, OPENS HIS MOUTH WIDE, RELEASING A SWARM OF LOCUSTS -- .

relation_updates: Defeats gang in conflict
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bruce retaliates against past humiliation using his powers.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Grace joins Bruce on the balcony, amazed by the manipulated sky; they embrace, kiss under a meteor shower, and plan to move to the bedroom, with Grace requesting five minutes.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bruce manipulates the sky to create a romantic setting for Grace.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bruce erases clouds, moves the moon closer, and adds stars to orchestrate a romantic moment.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To impress Grace and set a romantic mood by manipulating the sky.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce and Grace plan to move to the bedroom after their kiss under the manipulated sky.
evidence_quotes: ERASES THE CLOUDS, LIKE ON A CHALKBOARD.
makes a LASSOING MOTION, THEN BEGINS TO PULL.
adding several stars with points of his finger.
BRUCE Bedroom.

relation_updates: Bruce and Grace share intimate moment under manipulated sky
status_updates: Bruce now exercises cosmic-level powers for personal purposes
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bruce uses his divine powers for personal romantic purposes.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Grace confronts Bruce about his changed priorities and materialism, rejects his party invitation, and leaves, longing for the man he once was.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bruce presents the mansion as their new home and explains his career ambitions to Grace.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bruce's surprise mansion reveal and career plans lead to Grace rejecting the materialism and leaving, straining their relationship.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Bruce wants Grace to accept the mansion and support his future career moves.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce is alone in the mansion after Grace leaves.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bruce and Grace's relationship future is in doubt.
evidence_quotes: This is our new home.
I hate it.
What is happening to you? You're changing.
Oh, and that poor, struggling guy you talked about? I miss him.

relation_updates: Grace rejects mansion and Bruce's values
Grace refuses to attend Bruce's party
Grace expresses missing Bruce's former struggling self
status_updates: Bruce's relationship with Grace severely strained
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bruce is focused on material success and career advancement, which conflicts with Grace's values.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: God tells Bruce their time together is over, urging him to stop relying on divine help and to take responsibility for his own life by looking within instead of upward.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bruce being shown the negative consequences of his actions by God
timeline_nodes.salient_development: God uses room projections to demonstrate how Bruce's interventions backfired, including altering Filbert's career path and causing global disasters like melting polar caps.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce mopping alongside God while viewing examples of the harm caused by his actions.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to remedy the damage from his well-intentioned but misguided interventions.
evidence_quotes: BRUCE They're all out of control. I don't know what to do.
GOD Since when does anyone have a clue about what they want?

relation_updates: God begins to withdraw guidance by showing Bruce the harm caused
status_updates: Bruce's confidence in his god-like role is undermined
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bruce humbled by seeing the unintended negative outcomes of his god-like role.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bruce hears Grace pray to stop loving him, understands her pain, and silently lets her go with a wave, bearing her pain himself as she finds relief.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bruce hears Grace pray to stop loving him and lets her go with a wave.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bruce climbs the fire escape, hears Grace's prayer to forget him, understands her pain, and waves to release her from loving him, taking on her emotional pain.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To end Grace's suffering by releasing her from her love for him.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce now feels the pain that Grace no longer feels.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How Bruce will cope with the pain he has taken on.
evidence_quotes: He raises a hand, and with a simple wave, he performs an excruciatingly selfless act. He lets Grace go.
And it is Bruce now who feels that pain.
Bruce looks at her with total love.

relation_updates: Ends romantic relationship with Grace through selfless release
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Selflessly takes on another's pain to relieve them.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bruce Nolan nervously donates blood, fakes passing out, announces his engagement to Grace, and the scene transitions to a homeless man who transforms into God, who winks before credits roll.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Live reporter and fiancé to Grace Connelly
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Reports live at the blood drive in his own voice and announces engagement to Grace Connelly on air.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Engaged to Grace Connelly and has completed a live report in his own voice.
evidence_quotes: He's now talking in his OWN VOICE, much more himself.
For those of you who haven't heard, I'd like you to meet the soon to be Mrs. Exclusive.
Bruce smiles, they kiss...

relation_updates: Engaged to Grace Connelly
status_updates: Reports confidently in own voice at public event
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Confident reporter and fiancé

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Bruce Nolan, a dissatisfied field reporter, is passed over for an anchor position and suffers a humiliating on-air failure. After being fired and hitting rock bottom, he receives divine powers from God. Initially, he misuses them for personal gain and revenge, which strains his relationship with Grace and leads to chaos. Upon realizing the harm he has caused, Bruce surrenders his powers and selflessly prays for Grace's happiness, leading to their reconciliation and his redemption as a more humble and purposeful individual.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: God, as the janitor, offers Bruce his divine powers to prove he can do better, then vanishes; Bruce, terrified, flees after witnessing impossible events and the sudden disappearance of God.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: God in janitor guise reveals identity and challenges Bruce
timeline_nodes.salient_development: God demonstrates control over light with hand claps and reveals personal knowledge of Bruce's father and life, initiating a direct supernatural interaction.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce is physically dragged by the file cabinet drawer as God examines his life file.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bruce's skepticism and the outcome of God's examination of his file.
evidence_quotes: JANITOR You must be Bruce. I've been expecting you.
The Janitor CLAPS HIS HANDS TWICE and the light goes off.
JANITOR Your father knew that. He was a damn good welder.
He thumps the file cabinet with his fist and the drawer dramatically sucks closed, DRAGGING BRUCE BACK.

relation_updates: Establishes direct confrontation with Bruce
Reveals omniscience by referencing Bruce's father and file
status_updates: Performs miracles like controlling light and teleporting Bruce
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A janitor who knows everything about Bruce and manipulates physical phenomena.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: God, as the janitor, offers Bruce his divine powers to prove he can do better, then vanishes; Bruce, terrified, flees after witnessing impossible events and the sudden disappearance of God.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Divine challenger offering a test of power

timeline_nodes.goal_state: To endow Bruce with divine powers and test if he can do better.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: God has vanished after making the offer, leaving Bruce to flee the scene.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Bruce will accept and handle the divine powers.
evidence_quotes: You've been doing a lot of complaining about me, Bruce. And quite frankly, I'm tired of it...
When you leave this building you will be endowed with all my powers.
God the Janitor has also vanished.

relation_updates: Shifts from confrontation to issuing a challenge
Expresses tiredness with Bruce's blasphemy
status_updates: Decides to endow Bruce with God's powers
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I'm tired of your complaining, Bruce; here's your chance to do my job.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bruce uses telekinesis to part his soup, impressing a cockroach, when God suddenly appears and interrupts, startling him before inviting him for a walk.

timeline_nodes.salient_development: God interrupts Bruce's telekinesis practice and invites him for a walk.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: God has invited Bruce for a walk, and Bruce is awestruck.

GOD Let's take a walk.

relation_updates: Initiates direct interaction with Bruce
status_updates: Physically appears in the diner to engage Bruce

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: God and Bruce walk on a lake, watch a sailboat pass, and God takes back the prayer beads, saying he's going on vacation and leaves Bruce to return to shore alone.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: God explains the two rules for using divine power and departs on vacation.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: God informs Bruce of the rules (no revealing identity, no interfering with free will), retrieves the prayer beads from the lake, and announces he is taking a vacation.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: God has left for vacation, and Bruce is alone with divine powers.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Bruce can responsibly use the powers.
evidence_quotes: God dips his hand in the Lake and pulls out THE PRAYER BEADS. He pockets them as he talks.
GOD I'm taking a vacation.

relation_updates: Entrusts Bruce with divine powers
Takes back prayer beads
status_updates: Announces vacation, leaving Bruce in charge
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I gave Bruce my powers and went on vacation.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bruce thanks God, who reminds him he chose the divine mission and must now fulfill it, despite his reluctance, as Grace has already left, warning of dwindling time.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: God appears to Bruce to explain the source of the voices and criticize his limited use of powers and personal life.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: God reveals that the overwhelming voices are prayers Bruce is ignoring, points out his minimal help in Buffalo, and mocks his relationship struggles with Grace.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: God has confronted Bruce with his failures, and Bruce is back in the alley with Grace, aware of his shortcomings but defensive.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bruce continues to ignore prayers and has not adequately helped others with his powers.
evidence_quotes: GOD They're prayers, Bruce. You keep ignoring them and they're going to build up on you like that.
GOD The world? That wasn't the world, Bruce. That was just Buffalo, between Commonwealth and 57th.

relation_updates: Guides and criticizes Bruce's use of powers
auxiliary.persona_anchor: They're prayers, Bruce. You keep ignoring them and they're going to build up on you like that.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: God tells Bruce their time together is over, urging him to stop relying on divine help and to take responsibility for his own life by looking within instead of upward.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Mentor demonstrating consequences of Bruce's interventions
timeline_nodes.salient_development: God uses a remote to show Bruce specific negative outcomes from his actions, including personal examples and global disasters, and indicates their time together is ending.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: God has finished demonstrating the consequences and is prepared to end his direct guidance with Bruce.
evidence_quotes: GOD You mind giving me a hand with this floor first?
GOD Since when does anyone have a clue about what they want?

relation_updates: God shifts from active mentor to preparing for departure
status_updates: God reveals his perspective on human desires and divine challenges
auxiliary.persona_anchor: God shows Bruce the mess he made through concrete examples and prepares to say goodbye, emphasizing self-reliance.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: God tells Bruce their time together is over, urging him to stop relying on divine help and to take responsibility for his own life by looking within instead of upward.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: God ending his direct involvement with Bruce
timeline_nodes.salient_development: God says goodbye to Bruce, stating that humans hold their own power and should stop relying on divine help by looking within instead of upward.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: God has ascended into the light, leaving Bruce to think and handle things independently.
evidence_quotes: Everybody wants a miracle, Bruce. Want me to do everything for 'em. But what they don't understand is, they're the one's holding the power.
This is good-bye, Bruce. You've learned a lot. I think you should be able to handle things now.
See Bruce, that's your problem. That's everybody's problem. You keep looking up. . .

relation_updates: God ends his direct involvement with Bruce
status_updates: God ascends, leaving Bruce to handle things independently
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I told Bruce that people have the power and he needs to stop looking up, then I departed.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Grace visits Bruce, emotional; they share a laugh and a hug as he hides his deep emotions, holding prayer beads that stir memories of their bond and his recent trauma.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Heavenly authority in a white room after Bruce's death
timeline_nodes.salient_development: God meets Bruce's spirit, listens to his selfless prayer for Grace, approves it, and sends him back to life.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bruce is revived in the hospital with prayer beads in hand.
evidence_quotes: GOD You can't expect to kneel down in the middle of a highway and live to talk about it.
GOD I work in mysterious ways, son.
GOD Now that is a prayer. (beat) Well, I better get on that one. See ya, Bruce.

relation_updates: God acknowledges Bruce's growth and grants his prayer
status_updates: God intervenes to save Bruce's life after his surrender
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I acknowledged Bruce's surrender and granted his prayer for Grace before returning him to life.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bruce Nolan nervously donates blood, fakes passing out, announces his engagement to Grace, and the scene transitions to a homeless man who transforms into God, who winks before credits roll.

timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Grace prays to forget Bruce and stop hurting emotionally.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: After praying, her emotional pain is lifted, shown by her changed expression and wiping her eyes.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To forget Bruce and end her pain.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Feels relief as her pain is lifted.
evidence_quotes: ON GRACE Her face changes. She wipes her eyes. The pain is lifted.

relation_updates: Begins letting go of her love for Bruce
status_updates: Emotional pain lifted after praying to forget Bruce
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Prays to God for help in forgetting Bruce.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bruce Nolan nervously donates blood, fakes passing out, announces his engagement to Grace, and the scene transitions to a homeless man who transforms into God, who winks before credits roll.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Grace is present at the blood drive when Bruce publicly announces their engagement.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bruce names Grace as his fiancée to the crowd, and she smiles and kisses him in response.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Grace is engaged to Bruce Nolan.
evidence_quotes: For those of you who haven't heard, I'd like you to meet the soon to be Mrs. Exclusive.
GRACE * I don't know, I thought it was very * pleasurable.
Bruce smiles, they kiss...

relation_updates: Becomes engaged to Bruce Nolan
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Grace accepts Bruce's engagement announcement with a smile and kiss.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Grace Connelly starts as a cautious wife managing her husband Bruce's career hopes. She faces denial during a crisis, marital conflict, and unexplained physical changes attributed to Bruce. After her expectation of a proposal is crushed and she discovers his infidelity, she ends the relationship. Ultimately, through emotional release and forgiveness, she reconciles with Bruce and becomes engaged.
